children.description: Content to render once the component enters the viewport.

placeholder.description: Content to show while the children are deferred. Use a shimmer skeleton, spinner, or any custom placeholder.

rootMargin.description: Margin around the root (viewport) for the IntersectionObserver. Use positive values to preload content before it enters the viewport (e.g. "200px").

threshold.description: Percentage of the element that must be visible before mounting (0 to 1). 0 means any pixel visible triggers mount.

keepMounted.description: When true, children stay mounted after first visibility. When false, children unmount when scrolled out of view.

className.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the wrapper element.

style.description: Inline styles applied to the wrapper element.
